reviews.comment:
El hospedaje del ACA cuenta con piscina hoy 40 grados y la pileta sin mantenimiento, la habitación con aire acondicionado sin funcionar tuve q limpiar  los filtros para que enfríe  una lástima la falta de mantenimiento

(Translated by Google)
The ACA accommodation has a pool; today it's 40 degrees and the pool is unmaintained. The air conditioning in the room wasn't working; I had to clean the filters for it to cool. It's a shame about the lack of maintenance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbnNDNnNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Típica YPF, los baños Masomenos, la comida  cara pero fresca. En temporada alta si no llegas temprano te quedas sin opciones de comidas.

(Translated by Google)
Typical YPF station, the bathrooms are so-so, the food is expensive but fresh. In high season, if you don't arrive early, you'll be left with no food options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRemM2V0J3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala onda sobre todo los que atienden el despacho de Nafta se lo pasan hablando entre ellos y te despachan mal

(Translated by Google)
Very bad vibes, especially from the people who work at the gas station; they spend all their time talking amongst themselves and give you terrible service.
